allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''websites.json''\)\); print\(json.dumps\([data[''websites''][i] for i in [''1'',''2''] if i in data[''websites'']], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''websites.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(json.dumps\([data[''websites''][i] for i in [''1'',''2''] if i in data[''websites'']], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''websites.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(json.dumps\(list\(data.values\(\)\)[:2], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
